label: 12 cams — baseline
note: black-fill training: player goes see-through on 114/120 frames

label: 12 cams — alpha-fix
note: random bg + matte supervision: opaque on 119/120 frames

label: 24 cams — baseline
note: doubling cameras barely helps opacity (100/120 frames still see-through)

label: 24 cams — alpha-fix
note: fix + cameras: sharpest and opaque — count buys sharpness, fix buys solidity

label: SHOW 4K-trained — 12 cams
note: 4K Studios Show Pair, native 3840x2160 supervision, alpha-fix on (default)

label: SHOW 1080p-trained — 12 cams
note: same frames/cams as the 4K arm, x2-downsampled supervision — the resolution A/B

label: SHOW 4K-trained — 24 cams
note: native 4K supervision, 24-cam nested ring, alpha-fix on
